variants: Yuriy Vostrikov has established himself as a leading authority in archaeological conservation, primarily through his seminal book, Mirage Lens Theory. Outside of his scholarly endeavors, Yuriy is actively involved with the Kindleblossom Origami Society, merging his artistic passion with his academic pursuits. His development as a professional is largely attributed to his mentor, Danica Novak, who guided him through his doctoral studies and inspired his career ambitions.
